totalRecords.description: Total number of audit schedules included in this widget payload.

generatedAt.description: Payload generation timestamp in ISO-8601 format.

avgAuditsInProgress.description: Point 1: Average count of audits currently in 'In Progress' execution status across all auditors.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this section represents.

totalInProgressAudits.description: Total number of audit schedules where Execution Status = 'In Progress' across all auditors.

totalAuditors.description: Total number of distinct auditors who have at least one 'In Progress' audit.

averagePerAuditor.description: Pre-computed average: totalInProgressAudits / totalAuditors. Rounded to 1 decimal place.

avgLapsedAudits.description: Point 2: Average count of audits in 'Lapsed' execution status across the team.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this section represents.

totalLapsedAudits.description: Total number of audit schedules where Execution Status = 'Lapsed'.

totalAuditorsWithLapsed.description: Total number of distinct auditors who have at least one lapsed audit.

averageLapsedPerAuditor.description: Pre-computed average: totalLapsedAudits / totalAuditorsWithLapsed. Rounded to 1 decimal place.

zoneWithMaxDelayedAudits.description: Point 3: Zone(s) with the highest count of audits in 'Lapsed' or 'Not Executed' status.

topZones.description: Top zones sorted by total delayed audits descending. Maximum 3 zones shown.

auditorStartedAfterSchedule.description: Point 4: Auditors who started audits after the scheduled start date but before the audit end date (delayed start, within period).

totalSchedulesWithLateStart.description: Total number of schedules where Audit Start Date > Schedule Started At AND Audit Start Date <= End Audit Period.

totalUniqueAuditors.description: Total number of distinct auditors appearing in the late-start list.

displayedCount.description: Number of records actually listed in items[] (capped at 5).

remainingCount.description: Number of additional records beyond the top 5 (totalSchedulesWithLateStart - displayedCount). 0 if total <= 5.

items.description: Top 5 late-start records with key details.

topReAuditAuditors.description: Point 5: Top 10 auditors ranked by re-audit percentage (audits sent to re-audit / total audits * 100).

totalDelayedAudits.description: Total count of audits where Execution Status = 'Lapsed' OR 'Not Executed' in this zone.

lapsedCount.description: Count of schedules where Execution Status = 'Lapsed' in this zone.

notExecutedCount.description: Count of schedules where Execution Status = 'Not Executed' in this zone.

auditorName.description: Name of the auditor (from Auditor Name column).

auditType.description: Type of the audit (Main Audit Type or Sub-Audit Type).

auditeeName.description: Name of the auditee entity being audited.

scheduledStartDate.description: The originally scheduled start date (Schedule Started At), ISO-8601 date string.

auditStartDate.description: The actual date on which the audit was started (Audit Start Date), ISO-8601 date string.

totalAudits.description: Total number of audit schedules assigned to this auditor.

auditsGoneToReAudit.description: Number of schedules for this auditor where Re Audit Accepted At is not null (sent to re-audit).

reAuditPercentage.description: Pre-computed: (auditsGoneToReAudit / totalAudits) * 100. Rounded to 1 decimal place.
